long_description:
NRE were alerted of link between fas16b.sr01.lon06 Et27/1 <-> fcr01a.lon06 Et7/5 going down. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19768
short_description: fas16b.sr01.lon06 Et27/1 <-> fcr01a.lon06 Et7/5 | Link Down
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via automation.)
